title: gvisor cannot join a pod when running containers as runtime
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug


**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. run 
```
sudo podman --runtime runsc --runtime-flag debug --runtime-flag debug-log=/tmp/trsc-pod.log pod create --infra-name trsc-pod-infra --hostname trsc-pod-host --name trsc-pod --replace && sudo podman --runtime crun --runtime-flag debug --runtime-flag debug-log=/tmp/trsc-pod.log.2 pod start trsc-pod
```

2. run
```
sudo podman --runtime runsc --runtime-flag debug --runtime-flag debug-log=/tmp/trsc-container-t.log run --name trsc-container-t --pod trsc-pod --replace quay.io/podman/hello
```

**Describe the results you received:**

`Error: runsc: creating container: cannot load sandbox: open /var/run/runsc/trsc-pod_sandbox:trsc-pod.state: no such file or directory: OCI runtime attempted to invoke a command that was not found`

**Describe the results you expected:**
```
!... Hello Podman World ...!

         .--"--.           
       / -     - \         
      / (O)   (O) \        
   ~~~| -=(,Y,)=- |         
    .---. /`  \   |~~      
 ~/  o  o \~~~~.----. ~~   
  | =(X)= |~  / (O (O) \   
   ~~~~~~~  ~| =(Y_)=-  |   
  ~~~~    ~~~|   U      |~~ 

Project:   https://github.com/containers/podman
Website:   https://podman.io
Documents: https://docs.podman.io
Twitter:   @Podman_io
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
sysdig reports that gvisor never created /var/run/runsc/trsc-pod_sandbox:trsc-pod.state, instead it created /var/run/runsc/CONTAINER ID_sandbox:CONTAINER ID.state`

[trsc-container-t.log.txt](https://github.com/containers/podman/files/9274663/trsc-container-t.log.txt)
[trsc-pod.log.2.txt](https://github.com/containers/podman/files/9274664/trsc-pod.log.2.txt)
[trsc-pod.log.txt](https://github.com/containers/podman/files/9274665/trsc-pod.log.txt)

comments.body:
I've opened a PR to take care of this issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/15239

I am not sure we can address the other issue in Podman/conmon, since the container PID returned by gVisor is the PID for the sandbox process and that breaks conmon.  It is better to address it in gVisor to behave like other OCI runtimes

> I've opened a PR to take care of this issue: #15239
> 
> I am not sure we can address the other issue in Podman/conmon, since the container PID returned by gVisor is the PID for the sandbox process and that breaks conmon. It is better to address it in gVisor to behave like other OCI runtimes

How do I give feedback on this issue in gvisor?

> How do I give feedback on this issue in gvisor?

Opening an issue for the gVisor project itself

> > How do I give feedback on this issue in gvisor?
> 
> Opening an issue for the gVisor project itself

https://github.com/google/gvisor/issues/7949

> > How do I give feedback on this issue in gvisor?
> 
> Opening an issue for the gVisor project itself

Can you consider rolling back the pr corresponding to this issue? I think the maintainers of gvisor will notice that gvisor behaves differently from other oci runtimes
